Our 2025 Annual Impact Report details the Justice Forward Alliance's achievements over the past year. From landmark policy victories to grassroots mobilization, our community of advocates made incredible progress.

Highlights

  • 15 new state-level policy wins
  • 500,000 new supporters joined our movement
  • $2.3M in direct aid to affected communities
  • 3 major federal campaign victories

nodes.title: The State of Voting Access in America

body.processed:
This comprehensive report examines voting access across all 50 states, documenting barriers to ballot access and recommending reforms to strengthen democratic participation.

Key Findings

  • 18 states passed new voting restrictions in 2025
  • Wait times exceed 1 hour in many minority-majority precincts
  • Mail-in voting access varies dramatically by state
  • Voter registration modernization could add 50 million eligible voters

body.processed:
Our Climate Equity Scorecard grades federal and state climate policies on their equity impact, measuring whether climate action benefits or burdens marginalized communities.

Methodology

We evaluated policies across five dimensions: environmental health, economic impact, community engagement, access to clean energy, and disaster preparedness.

Results

  • Only 12 states earned passing grades
  • Low-income communities bear 3x the pollution burden
  • Clean energy investment reaches wealthy areas first
